overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character taking an elevator down from street level, exiting into a neon-lit futuristic cityscape at night, and walking through a bustling downtown area before entering a narrow alleyway lined with food vendors and red lanterns.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevator lobby with red metallic walls

events.description: pressing the elevator call button on the digital panel
elevator doors opening with a red light indicator

agents.ego_description: approaching the elevator control panel, pressing the call button, and waiting for the doors to open

entered.detail: digital touchscreen display showing 01 STREET floor with call elevator interface
large metallic sliding doors with red emergency lighting frame
dark red brushed metal wall paneling lining the corridor

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a dimly lit elevator lobby with red metallic walls. The camera approaches an elevator call panel displaying 01 STREET, presses the button, and waits as the metallic doors slide open with a red glow.

events.description: elevator begins descending as indicated by downward arrows on the display
floor display changes to show 19 MARKET during the descent

agents.ego_description: standing inside the descending elevator watching the news broadcast on wall screens

entered.detail: wall-mounted flatscreen displays showing a female news anchor in a pink outfit
yellow and black floor selection panel with digital readout
horizontal metallic grab bars mounted on the side walls

segments.scene_description: Inside the elevator car with red metallic walls, the camera faces the doors as the cab descends. News screens display a broadcast on the left wall while the floor indicator shows the descent to lower levels. The elevator is empty and quiet except for the hum of machinery.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic downtown commercial street with holographic ads

events.description: elevator doors open revealing the neon-lit city street outside
beginning to walk forward along the sidewalk away from the elevator
futuristic orange van drives past on the street

agents.ego_description: exiting the elevator and walking through the futuristic city street, observing the neon signs and holographic advertisements

notable_agents.action: pedestrian standing near the elevator exit with hands on hips wearing dark clothing
futuristic car driving down the neon-lit street

entered.detail: massive glowing advertisements covering the sides of skyscrapers displaying colorful graphics
tall glass and steel buildings with neon lighting and geometric architectural designs
reflective dark road surface with red and white lane markings glistening under neon lights
blue glowing 24/7 STORE sign on the building facade

segments.scene_description: The elevator opens onto a vast futuristic city plaza at night, surrounded by towering skyscrapers covered in massive holographic billboards. The camera walks along the wet asphalt street reflecting the neon lights, passing a distinctive red building with circular windows and a 24/7 store sign. Sparse pedestrian and vehicle traffic moves through the illuminated downtown area.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow neon-lit alleyway with food vendors

events.description: turning off the main street into a narrow alley between tall buildings
lighting shifts to dominant red neon glow from lanterns and signs

agents.ego_description: walking through the crowded narrow alley following a pedestrian with a yellow hat, passing food stalls and vending machines

notable_agents.action: pedestrian wearing a distinctive yellow hat walking ahead of the camera
group of people gathered outside a food stall browsing the menu

entered.detail: traditional-style red spherical lanterns hanging overhead between the buildings
tight corridor walls covered in neon signs and metal shutters
illuminated signs for BURRITO and other fast food vendors
red automated food and drink dispensers with glowing interfaces

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrow alleyway strung with red paper lanterns and lined with food stalls and vending machines. The camera follows a pedestrian with a yellow hat through the crowded corridor, passing neon signs for burritos and other vendors. The walls are covered in glowing advertisements and metal shutters, creating an intimate, enclosed atmosphere distinct from the open street.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the sterile confinement of a metallic elevator down into the sprawling, neon-drenched chaos of a futuristic city. It begins in a dimly lit lobby with red metallic walls, where the camera presses a call button before gliding into the descending elevator car. As the cab reaches the lower levels, the doors slide open to reveal a vast night plaza dominated by towering skyscrapers and massive holographic billboards reflecting off wet asphalt. The camera then moves through the illuminated downtown area, passing a red building with circular windows, before turning away from the open street into a narrow, enclosed alleyway. The scene finally settles into an intimate corridor strung with red paper lanterns and lined with glowing food stalls and vending machines.
